inputs.label: Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area to cover with fiber mesh (in square meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total surface area to cover with fiber mesh (in square meters)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiber mesh ile kaplanacak toplam yüzey alanı (metrekare cinsinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtfläche, die mit Fasergewebe abgedeckt werden soll (in Quadratmetern)

inputs.label: Roll Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of a single roll of fiber mesh (in meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of a single roll of fiber mesh (in meters)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir fiber mesh rulosunun genişliği (metre cinsinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite einer einzelnen Rolle Fasergewebe (in Metern)

inputs.label: Roll Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single roll of fiber mesh (in meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single roll of fiber mesh (in meters)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir fiber mesh rulosunun uzunluğu (metre cinsinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge einer einzelnen Rolle Fasergewebe (in Metern)

inputs.label: Overlap Distance
inputs.businessContext: Overlap between adjacent sheets (in meters), typically 0.1 m

businessContext_i18n.en: Overlap between adjacent sheets (in meters), typically 0.1 m
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitişik tabakalar arasındaki bindirme (metre cinsinden, genellikle 0,1 m)
businessContext_i18n.de: Überlappung zwischen benachbarten Bahnen (in Metern), typischerweise 0,1 m

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage extra material for cutting waste and errors (e.g., 5)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage extra material for cutting waste and errors (e.g., 5)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim atığı ve hatalar için yüzde ekstra malzeme (örneğin 5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des zusätzlichen Materials für Schnittabfall und Fehler (z. B. 5)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
